brief_summary: A coral line chart plotting DCS Olivetti's eight-week tracker score trajectory from W12 through W19 (values 4, 6, 9, 12, 14, 16, 17, 18). A vertical dashed marker at W15 indicates the April 13 group-buy close, showing interest continued climbing after the buy shut. Terminal data point at W19 is circled and labelled +18 direction up.
